title: After-Hours Corridor Intrusion
description: Multiple frames show an empty corridor followed by an intruder appearing. Agent must track temporal progression, identify when anomaly begins, classify risk, and decide on escalation.

frames.description: Empty building corridor with fluorescent lighting. No people present. Doors closed on both sides.
Same corridor. Still empty. A door on the left side appears slightly ajar that was previously closed.
Corridor now shows a person in dark hoodie walking suspiciously near doors, looking around. Dim lighting suggests emergency lights only.
The intruder is now crouching near a locked office door, appears to be attempting entry with tools.
